definitions: To alter one's opinion or decision.
To decide differently from what one had previously intended.
examples: She was going to move, but she changed her mind.
I've changed my mind about the color of the walls.
He never changes his mind once he's decided.
pastTenses: changed one's mind (simple past), has/have changed one's mind (present perfect), changed one's mind (past perfect)
